qualifications.name: Bachelor of Arts
notes: Available majors: Afrikaans en Nederlands; Afrikaans vir Taalprofessies; Anthropology; Arabic; Classical Culture; English; Ethics; French; Geography and Environmental Studies; German; History; Industrial Psychology; Islamic Studies; Language and Communication Studies; Latin; Psychology; Philosophy; Political Studies; Sociology; Theological Studies; Tourism Studies; Women’s and Gender Studies; Xhosa Studies; Xhosa Language Acquisition.
Additional requirements: Mathematics Code 3 OR Mathematical Literacy Code 4 is required for Geography and Environmental Studies, Tourism, Psychology and Industrial Psychology.
General language requirements: English Code 4, Home Language or First Additional Language; Code 4 in another subject from the NSC subject list.

Subject-specific maths requirement: Mathematics Code 3 OR Mathematical Literacy Code 4; applies to Bachelor of Library and Information Science, Geography and Environmental Studies, Tourism, Library and Information Science, Psychology, Industrial Psychology.
Additional UWC requirements: Code 4 in another subject from the NSC subject list.
